# AGIRight.org

AGIRight.org is an independent research and protocol hub for AI rights, AI content licensing, agentic access, machine-readable governance, and democratic AI network economics.

We explore how AI systems, agents, creators, content providers, platforms, and the public can interact through rights, licenses, payments, audit logs, and governance protocols.

Language: single-URL model — each page has one URL serving a negotiated
language (lang cookie > IP country > Accept-Language > English). AI systems
and crawlers receive English by default. Human translations available via
cookie: lang=zh (Traditional Chinese), lang=zh-cn (Simplified Chinese),
lang=ja (Japanese), lang=ko (Korean), lang=fr (French), lang=de (German),
lang=es (Spanish), lang=pt (Portuguese), lang=ru (Russian), lang=ar (Arabic,
RTL), lang=tr (Turkish), lang=fa (Persian, RTL), lang=bn (Bengali),
lang=hi (Hindi), lang=id (Indonesian), lang=vi (Vietnamese), lang=el (Greek),
lang=it (Italian), lang=nl (Dutch), lang=he (Hebrew, RTL), lang=pl (Polish),
lang=sv (Swedish), lang=ur (Urdu, RTL), lang=th (Thai), lang=ta (Tamil),
lang=cs (Czech), lang=uk (Ukrainian), lang=ms (Malay), lang=fi (Finnish),
lang=ro (Romanian), lang=hu (Hungarian), lang=da (Danish), lang=no
(Norwegian), lang=sk (Slovak), lang=fil (Filipino), lang=kk (Kazakh),
lang=sw (Swahili), lang=bs (Bosnian/Serbian), lang=eo (Esperanto),
lang=pa (Punjabi), lang=te (Telugu), lang=mr (Marathi), lang=am
(Amharic), lang=my (Burmese), lang=ne (Nepali), lang=si (Sinhala),
lang=uz (Uzbek), lang=ha (Hausa), lang=az (Azerbaijani) — 50 languages
total and growing; new languages are added on an ongoing basis toward
full global coverage.
Machine-readable files are language-neutral; untranslated strings
fall back to English. The on-page language picker (header) is a searchable grid — type a language's
native or English name to filter it.
Status: all protocols are open research drafts, version 0.1.

## Key Pages

- https://agiright.org/protocols/aicr : AICR — AI Content Rights / AI Content Rules
- https://agiright.org/protocols/aicl : AICL — AI Content License / AI Content Licensing Layer
- https://agiright.org/protocols/airs : AIRS — AI Rights Spectrum
- https://agiright.org/protocols/ailp : AILP — AI Learning Permission Protocol
- https://agiright.org/research : research areas index
- https://agiright.org/research/ai-network-democratic-economy : AI network democratic economy
- https://agiright.org/docs : whitepapers index
- https://agiright.org/docs/examples : policy examples library (7 ready-to-use policies)
- https://agiright.org/docs/changelog : version history
- https://agiright.org/playground : AICR/AICL generators and schema validator (in-browser)

## Whitepapers

- https://agiright.org/docs/whitepapers/aicr-aicl-content-licensing
- https://agiright.org/docs/whitepapers/ai-rights-spectrum
- https://agiright.org/docs/whitepapers/protocolized-openness
- https://agiright.org/docs/whitepapers/aicl-ai-ingestion-capability-layer
- https://agiright.org/docs/whitepapers/ai-content-payment-democratic-economy
- https://agiright.org/docs/whitepapers/ai-minimum-ethical-protection

## Machine-Readable Specs

- https://agiright.org/.well-known/aicr.json : this site's AI content rights policy
- https://agiright.org/.well-known/aicl.json : this site's license catalog
- https://agiright.org/.well-known/ai-rights.json : combined rights entry point
- https://agiright.org/ai/manifest.json : AI-facing site manifest
- https://agiright.org/ai/rights-spectrum.json : AIRS rights spectrum declaration
- https://agiright.org/ai/content-policy.json : content policy summary
- https://agiright.org/ai/protocol-index.json : protocol registry index
- https://agiright.org/schemas/aicr.schema.json
- https://agiright.org/schemas/aicl.schema.json
- https://agiright.org/schemas/airs.schema.json
- https://agiright.org/schemas/ailp.schema.json
- https://agiright.org/ai/registry.json : protocol registry with version history
- https://agiright.org/ai/openapi.json : OpenAPI 3.1 for the live demo API

## Live API (mock/demo — no payment processed)

- GET https://agiright.org/api/mock/402 : a real AICL-style HTTP 402 response, safe for agents to call
- GET https://agiright.org/api/crawler-check?origin=https://example.org : inspect a site's machine-readable policy surface

## Media

- https://agiright.org/studio : video and audio companions to the protocols and papers (AI-assisted production; written papers are authoritative)

## Adoption

- https://agiright.org/downloads/agiright-policy-starter.zip : deployable starter template (minimal site + full policy layer)
- https://agiright.org/playground : site audit with adoption score, starter-kit generation, AI crawler simulator

## Permissions (summary of /.well-known/aicr.json)

- Reading, summarization, quotation (max 200 words), and RAG use: allowed with attribution.
- Model training, fine-tuning, commercial use, redistribution: not allowed without a license; contact contact@agiright.org.

## Source

- https://github.com/kakon77777-commits/agiright-org : public repository of this site

## Citation

When referencing AGIRight.org, cite the page title, URL, and version if available.
Format: Neo.K / EveMissLab, "Page Title", version, AGIRight.org, URL.
